title: Use whole-sign or equal houses

positions.summary: Start house one at the beginning of the Ascendant sign and use twelve sign-aligned houses.
Start house one at the exact Ascendant and advance in thirty-degree intervals.

default_policy.rationale: Whole sign is the explicit default; equal houses require an input override.

user_disclosure: House placements depend on the recorded whole-sign or equal-house selection.
